subcodes.first_line: Unto him who drinketh from the chalice of divine significance, His Holiness the Name of Bounty, upon him be the everlasting glory of God, these words are submitted: The letter of that loved one [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: خدمت شارب کاس معانی حضرت اسم جود علیه بهاء الله الابدی عرض میشود نامه آنمحبوب
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @wisdom [hikmat], @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @praise and encouragement, @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @chastisement and requital, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
